economic_notes: First Nation owns 50% of Saugeen Ojibway Nation Finance Corporation which holds a 35.19% interest in B2M Limited Partnership (high voltage electrical transmission line between Kincardine and Milton ON). Also operates Gas Bar, Driftwood Corporation (broadband and solar), Red Road Cafe & Grill, Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership interest, and Dufferin Wind Farm revenue. COVID-19 impacted operations in 2020-2021.
notes: Audit report signed October 19, 2023 for a March 31, 2021 year-end — approximately 2.5 years late. Saugeen Ojibway Nation Finance Corporation (50% owned) is proportionately consolidated at 50% rather than equity method. Portfolio investments of $37,089,367 consist of B2M LP units held via SONFC. Total segmented revenue of $29,406,066 differs slightly from statement of operations total of $29,058,917 due to inter-segment eliminations. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. expenses_enterprises includes Gas Bar ($2,302,683), Driftwood ($68,802), Red Road Cafe ($39,656), and SONFC ($1,321,800). isc_funding identified as Federal government transfers; total_government_transfers is Provincial ($4,073,593) plus Federal ($9,446,569) = $13,520,162. Prior year segmented revenue total was $29,569,138 vs statement total of $28,804,595 due to eliminations.
